data.body: DOGFOOD / LIVE E2E PROVEN: change #618 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/618) MERGED on main by the deployed auto-lander (submitter='Rebar Bot Nava', NOT a human). I set Autosubmit+1 and walked away; the bot selected it, and because main advanced under it, REBASED to a fresh Patch Set 3, awaited a fresh Verified+1 on the rebased tree, and ancestor-atomic-submitted -> merged. Exercised the full R5-preserving rebase-and-re-verify path live. Three real drive bugs were found+fixed via dogfooding (all mock-invisible): upfront-rebase-of-on-tip (#597), merged-ancestor chain misclassification (#607), is_landable missing SUBMITTABLE opt (#619); fake hardened to catch the missing-opt class. Minor follow-up: close_ticket_via_rebar annotates using the Gerrit change-id, not the rebar-ticket trailer -> best-effort annotate fails + logs a spurious AUTOLANDER_ERROR (land still succeeds).
